sections.paragraph:
-

(1) to draw, to draw out, Exo 2:10. (Syr. ܡܫܳܐ id.)

(2) to save, to preserve, i.q. חִצִּיל. Isa 63:11, משֶׁח עַמֹּו “the saviour of his people” (God). [This word משֶׁח is in Thes. referred to the pr.n.]

Hiphil, i.q. Kal No. 1, 2Sa 22:17 Psa 18:17.

Derivative מְשִׁי, pr.n. משֶׁה, נִמְשִׁי.

II.
